architectural_notes: UI changes only - backend, login, and registration functionality must remain untouched

Transform the floating action button into a perfectly circular shape
Fix the Daily logo proportions inside the button so it displays without deformation or distortion
Add elegant visual styling to the send money button including subtle shadows, smooth gradients, and refined hover animations

new_feature_requests.summary: Improve send money button: make it circular, double size, fix logo proportions, add elegant styling (shadows, gradients, hover animations)
